name: Photomator
description: A powerful yet intuitive photo editing application for Mac, iPhone, and iPad, offering advanced tools for color adjustment, retouching, and photo management.
longDescription: Photomator is a professional photo editing application developed by the Pixelmator Team in Lithuania. Designed to empower photographers and enthusiasts, it provides a seamless and intuitive platform for editing and managing photo libraries. Launched with a focus on advanced color adjustments, AI-driven selections, and efficient batch editing, Photomator supports over 750 RAW image formats. Its robust toolset includes Super Resolution, Denoise, and a Repair tool for effortless retouching. With deep integration into the Apple ecosystem, Photomator ensures a fluid experience across Mac, iPhone, and iPad, making it a go-to solution for modern photography workflows.
features: Super Resolution and Denoise for image enhancement
Fast performance with machine learning features
